figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of the proposed DINO 4D framework. Given an RGB video sequence, a frozen St4RTrack backbone predicts dual pointmaps for tracking and reconstruction. A frozen DINOv3 semantic encoder extracts patch-level semantic tokens that are injected into the geometric stream via a semantic adapter. The resulting semantic-aware representation enables consistent 4D trajectory estimation and semantic 4D reconstruction. Frozen modules are shown in blue, while trainable components are highlighted in orange.
